Bash(python3 -c "
from grounding import compute_grounding_score, score_statutes
claims = ['The landlord violated the warranty of habitability.', 'Section 27-2029 requires minimum heat standards.']
chunks = ['NYC Admin Code Section 27-2029 requires landlords to provide heat at 68 degrees Fahrenheit between 6am and 10pm.', 'Warranty of habitability obligates landlords to maintain livable conditions.']
r = compute_grounding_score\(claims, chunks\)
print\('overall_confidence:', r['overall_confidence']\)
print\('claim_scores:', [\(c['score'], c['verified']\) for c in r['claim_scores']]\)
")
